scene:reference_mirror_grid.object_description: a Reference cell beside labeled option cells containing icons

scene:missing_mirror_grid.object_description: a mirror-symmetry icon grid with one question-mark cell and labeled option icons

task:mirror_symmetry_match_label.question_text: Which labeled option cell has the same mirror symmetry as the Reference cell?
task:mirror_symmetry_match_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON object with keys "reference_cell" and "matching_option_cell", each mapped to a [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates
task:mirror_symmetry_match_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the matching option letter

task:missing_mirror_cell_label.question_text: Which labeled option should replace the question mark to complete the mirror symmetry?
task:missing_mirror_cell_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box in image pixel coordinates for the correct option cell
task:missing_mirror_cell_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the correct option letter
